_meta.title: LTXV音频文本编码器加载器

inputs.value:
正向提示词 (Positive Prompt) :
(masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, photorealistic:1.3),
beautiful young Asian woman, (consistent identity across frames:1.2),
(messy updo hairstyle with loose strands:1.3), (soft natural skin texture:1.1), (calm and wise gaze:1.2), highly detailed eyelashes,
(voluptuous figure, full bust, ample cleavage:1.2), (upright posture:1.2),
wearing light cream vintage floral blouse, (deep V-neck:1.3), rolled-up sleeves, intricate fabric texture,
indoors, nighttime, (large window with heavy rain outside:1.4), (raindrops on glass:1.4), bokeh city lights in the distance,
(cinematic lighting:1.3), (volumetric lighting:1.2), ( Rembrandt lighting on face:1.1), dramatic shadows,
professional color grading, desaturated blue and warm beige tones,
sharp focus on face and eyes, stable framing, static subject, frozen pose, pure visual composition, no textual elements,
(lock camera on subject:1.1), (no body movement:1.3), (micro-expression only:1.2).

[分镜 01]
Duration Range: 0s - 3s
Duration: 3 seconds
Camera: 固定机位，中景（Medium Shot），略微过肩视角。
Environment: 背景为虚化的窗边雨景，雨滴顺着玻璃滑落，窗外是模糊的城市光斑。光线透过带水珠的玻璃打在女主角面部，形成柔和的高光。
Subject: 女主角直立，目光温柔且坚定地注视着前方的男性。男性背对镜头，作为倾听者存在。
Audio: “没有人会把你 变得越来越好”
[Prompt Append]
[Duration: 3s], [Audio: Clear female speech], static camera, medium shot, over the shoulder shot.
Female protagonist stands still, looking gently and firmly at the male figure in front of her. Soft, natural lighting on her face. | [分镜 02]
Duration Range: 3s - 8s
Duration: 5 seconds
Camera: 固定机位，中景（Medium Shot）。
Environment: 背景的光影保持静态，焦点始终聚集在两人的面部表情和眼神交流上。
Subject: 人物身体和头部绝不转动，始终保持面向前方的男性。女主角眼神深邃平静，仿佛在进行一场重要的自我剖析。
Audio: “你越来越好的原因，是因为 你一次次的经历，一次次的自救”
[Prompt Append]
[Duration: 5s], [Audio: Continuous female speech], static camera, medium shot.
CRITICAL: She remains absolutely still facing the man. No head movement. Deep, contemplative eyes holding the gaze. The man listens silently. | [分镜 03]
Duration Range: 8s - 11s
Duration: 3 seconds
Camera: 固定机位，中景（Medium Shot）。
Environment: 背景依然保持窗边的朦胧感，光线稳定，突显两人之间的情感张力。
Subject: 依旧保持静止，维持着眼神接触。女主角嘴角微微上扬，神情变得更加笃定自信。
Audio: “一次次的放下，又一次次的成长”
[Prompt Append]
[Duration: 3s], [Audio: Soft female speech], static camera, medium shot.
Maintaining eye contact, her expression becomes more determined and confident. A slight, knowing smile forms. She is the speaker. | [分镜 04]
Duration Range: 11s - 15s
Duration: 4 seconds
Camera: 固定机位，中景（Medium Shot）。
Environment: 背景维持不变，整体氛围宁静致远，强调人物间的默契。
Subject: 人物依然站在原地，不后退。女主角面部表情逐渐舒缓，最终露出释然且鼓励的微笑。
Audio: “引路靠贵人，走路靠自己”
[Prompt Append]
[Duration: 4s], [Audio: Confident female speech], static camera, medium shot.
She stays rooted in place, not moving back. Her expression softens into a serene and encouraging smile as she looks at the silent listener.
